modeling
dispatch: att - ate - did - gee - mixed

span.p:
Flat DAG, forever. Add a STUDY = one config row. Add a METHOD/MODEL = one
branch inside a notebook. for_each fans out (and parallelizes) over all studies.
Only ONE condition task remains: the legitimate pass/fail data-quality gate.
